debug_info.goal:
U : Type
A : Set U
⊢ Set ↑A ∼ ↑(𝒫 A)

proof:
by
  set f : Set A → 𝒫 A := fun X => ⟨val_image A X, by
    rw [← range_val_image A]
    exact Exists.intro X rfl⟩
  apply Exists.intro f
  apply And.intro
  · -- one_to_one
    define
    fix X1 : Set A; fix X2 : Set A
    assume h : f X1 = f X2
    have h' : val_image A X1 = val_image A X2 := by
      have : (f X1).val = (f X2).val := congrArg Subtype.val h
      exact this
    exact Set.Subset.antisymm (subset_of_val_image_eq h') (subset_of_val_image_eq h'.symm)
  · -- onto
    define
    fix y : 𝒫 A
    have hy : y.val ∈ range (val_image A) := by
      rw [range_val_image A]
      exact y.property
    obtain ⟨X, hX⟩ := hy
    apply Exists.intro X
    apply Subtype.ext
    exact hX
failed_attempts:
by
  have h1 : one_to_one (val_image A) := val_image_one_one A
  have h2 : range (val_image A) = 𝒫 A := range_val_image A
  define at h1
  define
  set f : Set A → 𝒫 A := fun X => ⟨val_image A X, by rw [← h2]; exact ⟨X, rfl⟩⟩
  use f
  apply And.intro
  · -- one_to_one
    define
    intro X1 X2 hf
    have heq : val_image A X1 = val_image A X2 := by
      simp only [Subtype.mk.injEq] at hf
      exact hf
    exact h1 X1 X2 heq
  · -- onto
    define
    intro ⟨B, hB⟩
    rw [← h2] at hB
    obtain ⟨X, hX⟩ := hB
    use X
    simp only [Subtype.mk.injEq]
    exact hX

by
  define
  use val_image A
  apply And.intro (val_image_one_one A)
  rw [range_val_image]

by
  define
  use val_image A
  apply And.intro (val_image_one_one A)
  rw [onto_iff_range_eq_univ]
  rw [range_val_image]
  rfl

by
  define
  use val_image A
  apply And.intro
  · exact val_image_one_one A
  · exact range_val_image A

by
  define
  use val_image A
  apply And.intro
  · exact val_image_one_one A
  · have h := range_val_image A
    rw [h]
    rfl

by
  define
  use val_image A
  apply And.intro
  · exact val_image_one_one A
  · exact range_val_image A

  have h2 : range (val_image A) = 𝒫 A := range_val_image A

  set f : Set A → 𝒫 A := fun X => ⟨val_image A X, by rw [← h2]; exact ⟨X, rfl⟩⟩
  apply Exists.intro f
  define
  apply And.intro
  · -- one_to_one f
    define
    intro X1 X2 hf
    have : val_image A X1 = val_image A X2 := by
      simp only [Subtype.mk.injEq] at hf
      exact hf
    exact h1 this
  · -- onto f
    define
    intro ⟨B, hB⟩
    rw [← h2] at hB
    obtain ⟨X, hX⟩ := hB
    use X
    simp only [Subtype.mk.injEq]
    exact hX

by
  define
  use val_image A
  apply And.intro (val_image_one_one A)
  rw [range_val_image]

by

by
  have h1 : one_to_one (val_image A) := val_image_one_one A
  have h2 : range (val_image A) = 𝒫 A := range_val_image A
  define at h1
  have h3 : onto (val_image A) := by
    define
    intro y
    rw [h2]
    intro hy
    use y
  exact Theorem_8_1_3_1 h1 h3

by
  define
  use val_image A
  apply And.intro (val_image_one_one A)
  rw [range_val_image]

by
  set f : Set A → 𝒫 A := fun X => ⟨val_image A X, by
    rw [← range_val_image A]
    exact Exists.intro X rfl⟩
  apply Exists.intro f
  constructor
  · -- one_to_one
    intro X1 X2 h
    have h' : val_image A X1 = val_image A X2 := by
      have : (⟨val_image A X1, _⟩ : ↑(𝒫 A)) = ⟨val_image A X2, _⟩ := h
      exact Subtype.val_injective this
    exact val_image_one_one A h'
  · -- onto
    intro ⟨B, hB⟩
    rw [← range_val_image A] at hB
    obtain ⟨X, hX⟩ := hB
    use X
    apply Subtype.ext
    exact hX

by
  have h1 : one_to_one (val_image A) := val_image_one_one A
  have h2 : range (val_image A) = 𝒫 A := range_val_image A
  define at h1
  have h3 : onto (val_image A) := by
    define
    intro y
    rw [← h2]
    define
    use y
    rfl
  exact equinum_def.mpr ⟨val_image A, h1, h3⟩

  use val_image A

  · -- (→)

    define

  · -- (←)

    rw [← h2] at hy
    define at hy
    obtain ⟨x, hx⟩ := hy
    rw [← hx]
    define
    exact ⟨x, rfl⟩

    define

    exact hX
